name: Industry & Sector Strategic Analysis Ontology
alternateName: INDUSTRY-ONT — Porter's, SWOT/TOWS, Ansoff Growth & Competitive Strategy
description: Formalizes industry-level strategic analysis frameworks: Porter's Five Forces Analysis (structured assessment layer over orgctx:CompetitiveForce), SWOT/TOWS Synthesis (linking internal strengths/weaknesses to external opportunities/threats for strategy generation), and Ansoff Growth Matrix (product/market expansion direction). These frameworks feed industry intelligence into VSOM StrategyComponent and BSC-ONT for execution. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis). Does NOT duplicate ORG-CONTEXT entities — references them and adds the analytical framework layer.
oaa:domain: Strategic Management, Competitive Strategy, Industry Analysis

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Porter-to-VSOM Strategy Feed
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Porter's Five Forces analysis enriches the competitive landscape that VSOM's review cycle monitors. Force shifts trigger strategy review and potential iteration.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ind:PortersFiveForcesAnalysis → ind:enrichesLandscape → orgctx:CompetitiveLandscape ← vsom:reviewsLandscape ← vsom:StrategicReviewCycle → vsom:informsStrategy → vsom:StrategyComponent
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Industry structure changes feed through to strategy updates

oaa:joinPatterns.name: SWOT-TOWS-VSOM Strategy Pipeline
oaa:joinPatterns.description: SWOT analysis generates strategic options via TOWS synthesis, which produce candidate strategies for VSOM StrategyComponent.
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: End-to-end: SWOT assessment generates TOWS strategy options for VSOM adoption

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Ansoff-to-Portfolio Alignment
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Growth direction choice flows through VSOM strategy into PPM portfolio investment allocation and BSC execution.
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Growth strategy drives balanced scorecard objectives and portfolio investment

oaa:joinPatterns.name: SWOT Weakness-to-Gap Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: SWOT internal weaknesses link to GA-ONT identified gaps and EA-CORE capability gaps for remediation planning.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: ind:SWOTFactor [weakness] → ind:factorLinksToGap → ga:IdentifiedGap; ind:SWOTFactor [weakness] → ind:factorLinksToCapabilityGap → ea:CapabilityGap
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Connect strategic weakness identification to formal gap analysis and capability planning

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Industry Analysis Full Context
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Full traversal from organization through competitive context through industry analysis to strategy formulation.
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: org:Organization → org:hasContext → orgctx:OrganizationContext → orgctx:competitiveLandscape → orgctx:CompetitiveLandscape → ind:analyzedBy → ind:PortersFiveForcesAnalysis; orgctx:OrganizationContext → ind:analyzedBySWOT → ind:SWOTAnalysis
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Complete industry analysis context for strategic decision-making

entities.name: PortersFiveForcesAnalysis
entities.description: Structured Porter's Five Forces assessment that adds analytical scoring, strategic response options, and VSOM integration on top of existing orgctx:CompetitiveForce entities. Does NOT replace CompetitiveForce — it references them and adds the analysis framework. Produces an overall industry attractiveness score and strategic implications that feed into VSOM StrategyComponent.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: competitiveLandscapeRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:CompetitiveLandscape @id containing the underlying CompetitiveForce entities

oaa:properties.name: industry
oaa:properties.description: Industry being analyzed (e.g. NAICS/SIC code or name)

oaa:properties.name: industryAttractiveness
oaa:properties.description: Overall industry attractiveness score (1.0=unattractive, 5.0=highly attractive). Weighted average of five force scores.

oaa:properties.name: overallAssessment
oaa:properties.description: Narrative summary of industry competitive dynamics

oaa:properties.name: strategicImplications
oaa:properties.description: Key implications for VSOM strategy formulation

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id informed by this analysis

oaa:properties.name: reviewCycleRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategicReviewCycle @id triggered by force changes

oaa:properties.name: validUntil
oaa:properties.description: Date by which this analysis should be refreshed

entities.name: ForceAssessment
entities.description: Detailed assessment of a single Porter's force. References an existing orgctx:CompetitiveForce and adds scoring, driver analysis, strategic response options, and trend direction. Five ForceAssessments compose one PortersFiveForcesAnalysis.

oaa:properties.name: competitiveForceRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:CompetitiveForce @id being assessed

oaa:properties.name: forceType
oaa:properties.description: Maps to orgctx:CompetitiveForce.forceType values

oaa:properties.name: intensityScore
oaa:properties.description: Force intensity score (1.0=very low, 5.0=very high)

oaa:properties.name: trend
oaa:properties.description: Direction the force intensity is moving

oaa:properties.name: keyDrivers
oaa:properties.description: Factors driving this force's intensity

oaa:properties.name: barrierFactors
oaa:properties.description: For entry/substitute forces: specific barriers or lack thereof

oaa:properties.name: strategicResponse
oaa:properties.description: Recommended strategic response to this force

oaa:properties.name: impactOnMargin
oaa:properties.description: Impact of this force on industry profit margins

oaa:properties.name: weight
oaa:properties.description: Weight of this force in overall attractiveness calculation (0.0-1.0, sum of 5 = 1.0)

entities.name: SWOTAnalysis
entities.description: Structured SWOT analysis linking internal Strengths/Weaknesses to external Opportunities/Threats. Internal factors reference org capabilities (ea:BusinessCapability), maturity (orgctx maturity types), and competitive position. External factors reference orgctx:Trend (PESTEL-typed) and orgctx:CompetitiveLandscape signals. SWOT quadrants map to VSOM components: Strengths→leverage in Strategy, Weaknesses→address in Objectives, Opportunities→shape Vision, Threats→constrain Strategy.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: scope
oaa:properties.description: Scope of analysis — can be done at multiple levels

oaa:properties.name: scopeEntityRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to specific orgctx:Product, orgctx:Brand, or business unit if scope is not Corporate

oaa:properties.name: porterAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:PortersFiveForcesAnalysis @id that informed external factors

oaa:properties.name: overallAssessment
oaa:properties.description: Summary strategic assessment

oaa:properties.name: towsSynthesisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:TOWSSynthesis @id generated from this SWOT

entities.name: SWOTFactor
entities.description: A single factor in one of the four SWOT quadrants. Typed as Strength, Weakness, Opportunity, or Threat. Each factor can cross-reference existing ontology entities: Strengths/Weaknesses → ea:BusinessCapability, orgctx maturity; Opportunities/Threats → orgctx:Trend, orgctx:CompetitiveForce, ga:OpportunityAssessment, ga:ThreatAssessment.

oaa:properties.name: category
oaa:properties.description: Category of factor for structured analysis

oaa:properties.name: significance
oaa:properties.description: How significant this factor is to strategic outcomes

oaa:properties.name: timeframe
oaa:properties.description: For O/T: when will this manifest

oaa:properties.name: probability
oaa:properties.description: For O/T: probability of materializing (0.0-1.0)

oaa:properties.name: sustainability
oaa:properties.description: For S: how sustainable is this advantage; For W: how entrenched is this weakness

oaa:properties.name: capabilityRef
oaa:properties.description: For S/W: reference to ea:BusinessCapability @id

oaa:properties.name: maturityDimensionRef
oaa:properties.description: For S/W: reference to orgctx maturity subtype

oaa:properties.name: trendRef
oaa:properties.description: For O/T: reference to orgctx:Trend @id

oaa:properties.name: competitiveForceRef
oaa:properties.description: For O/T: reference to orgctx:CompetitiveForce @id

oaa:properties.name: gapRef
oaa:properties.description: For W: reference to ga:IdentifiedGap @id or ea:CapabilityGap @id

oaa:properties.name: threatAssessmentRef
oaa:properties.description: For T: reference to ga:ThreatAssessment @id

oaa:properties.name: opportunityAssessmentRef
oaa:properties.description: For O: reference to ga:OpportunityAssessment @id

oaa:properties.name: competitorRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:Competitor @id if factor is competitor-related

oaa:properties.name: vsomImplication
oaa:properties.description: Which VSOM component this factor most impacts

oaa:properties.name: evidenceSources
oaa:properties.description: Data or analysis supporting this factor

_vsomMapping.Strength: Leverage in vsom:StrategyComponent — what we build strategy ON
_vsomMapping.Weakness: Address via vsom:ObjectivesComponent and ga:IdentifiedGap — what we must fix
_vsomMapping.Opportunity: Shape vsom:VisionComponent — what future we pursue

entities.name: TOWSSynthesis
entities.description: TOWS Matrix — the action-oriented output of SWOT analysis. Generates strategy options by systematically crossing internal factors (S/W) with external factors (O/T) across four quadrants: SO (Maxi-Maxi: aggressive growth), WO (Mini-Maxi: turnaround), ST (Maxi-Mini: defensive), WT (Mini-Mini: survival). Each quadrant produces candidate strategies for VSOM adoption.

oaa:properties.name: swotAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:SWOTAnalysis @id this synthesis derives from

entities.name: TOWSStrategy
entities.description: A single strategy option generated from the TOWS matrix. Links specific internal factors to external factors to produce an actionable strategy candidate. Strategies can be adopted by VSOM StrategyComponent or rejected with rationale.

oaa:properties.name: towsQuadrant
oaa:properties.description: SO=Strength-Opportunity (aggressive), WO=Weakness-Opportunity (turnaround), ST=Strength-Threat (defensive), WT=Weakness-Threat (survival)

oaa:properties.name: strategicPosture
oaa:properties.description: Strategic posture implied by quadrant

oaa:properties.name: internalFactorRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to ind:SWOTFactor @ids (S or W) combined in this strategy

oaa:properties.name: externalFactorRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to ind:SWOTFactor @ids (O or T) combined in this strategy

oaa:properties.name: adoptionStatus
oaa:properties.description: Whether VSOM adopted this strategy option

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id if adopted

oaa:properties.name: rejectionRationale
oaa:properties.description: Why this strategy was not adopted

oaa:properties.name: ansoffQuadrant
oaa:properties.description: Which Ansoff quadrant this strategy aligns to, if applicable

entities.name: AnsoffGrowthMatrix
entities.description: Ansoff Growth Matrix — growth direction analysis across Product (existing/new) x Market (existing/new). Four quadrants: Market Penetration (low risk), Market Development (moderate), Product Development (moderate), Diversification (high risk). The chosen growth path informs VSOM StrategyComponent and directs PPM portfolio investment allocation. References orgctx:Product, orgctx:Brand, orgctx:MarketContext for existing portfolio, and identifies new market/product opportunities.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: swotAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:SWOTAnalysis @id informing growth direction choice

oaa:properties.name: selectedGrowthPath
oaa:properties.description: Primary growth direction chosen

oaa:properties.name: rationale
oaa:properties.description: Why this growth path was selected

oaa:properties.name: overallGrowthTarget
oaa:properties.description: Overall revenue/market growth target (%)

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id aligned to growth choice

oaa:properties.name: portfolioRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ppm:Portfolio @id for investment allocation

entities.name: AnsoffQuadrant
entities.description: One of four Ansoff growth quadrants with specific strategies, risk profile, existing/new product-market combinations, and growth targets. Each quadrant can reference existing orgctx:Product and orgctx:MarketContext for existing portfolio, and identify new opportunities.

oaa:properties.name: strategies
oaa:properties.description: Specific growth strategies for this quadrant

oaa:properties.name: existingProductRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to orgctx:Product @ids (existing products)

oaa:properties.name: existingMarketRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to orgctx:MarketContext @ids (existing markets)

oaa:properties.name: newProducts
oaa:properties.description: New product concepts being considered

oaa:properties.name: newMarkets
oaa:properties.description: New market segments being considered

oaa:properties.name: growthTarget
oaa:properties.description: Growth target for this quadrant (%)

oaa:properties.name: investmentAllocation
oaa:properties.description: Percentage of total growth investment allocated to this quadrant

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyType
oaa:properties.description: Which VSOM strategy type this quadrant aligns to

oaa:properties.name: bscPerspectiveFocus
oaa:properties.description: Dominant BSC perspective for this quadrant

oaa:properties.name: diversificationType
oaa:properties.description: For Diversification quadrant only: type of diversification

oaa:properties.name: initiativeRefs
oaa:properties.description: References to ppm:Initiative @ids driving growth in this quadrant

entities.name: CompetitivePositioning
entities.description: Strategic positioning assessment combining Porter's generic strategies (cost leadership, differentiation, focus) with competitive position (leader, challenger, follower, niche). Synthesizes Porter's 5F and SWOT findings into a positioning recommendation that feeds VSOM StrategyComponent and VP-ONT Differentiator.

oaa:properties.name: contextRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to orgctx:OrganizationContext @id

oaa:properties.name: genericStrategy
oaa:properties.description: Porter's generic competitive strategy

oaa:properties.name: competitivePosition
oaa:properties.description: Current market position relative to competitors

oaa:properties.name: targetPosition
oaa:properties.description: Target market position

oaa:properties.name: positioningStatement
oaa:properties.description: Concise positioning statement

oaa:properties.name: coreDifferentiators
oaa:properties.description: References to vp:Differentiator @ids

oaa:properties.name: competitiveAdvantageSource
oaa:properties.description: Primary source of competitive advantage

oaa:properties.name: sustainabilityOfAdvantage
oaa:properties.description: How defensible is this positioning

oaa:properties.name: strategicMoat
oaa:properties.description: Description of competitive moat protecting the position

oaa:properties.name: porterAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:PortersFiveForcesAnalysis @id

oaa:properties.name: swotAnalysisRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to ind:SWOTAnalysis @id

oaa:properties.name: vsomStrategyRef
oaa:properties.description: Reference to vsom:StrategyComponent @id this positioning informs

relationships.name: Analyzed By Porter's
relationships.description: Competitive landscape is analyzed by a Porter's Five Forces assessment

relationships.name: Enriches Landscape
relationships.description: Porter's analysis enriches the competitive landscape with structural force assessments

relationships.name: Has Force Assessment
relationships.description: Porter's analysis contains five force assessments

relationships.name: Assesses Force
relationships.description: Force assessment references an existing competitive force entity

relationships.name: Porter Informs Strategy
relationships.description: Porter's analysis informs VSOM strategy formulation

relationships.name: Porter Triggers Review
relationships.description: Significant force changes trigger a VSOM strategic review cycle

relationships.name: Analyzed By SWOT
relationships.description: Organization context is analyzed by a SWOT assessment

relationships.name: Has SWOT Factor
relationships.description: SWOT analysis contains individual factors across four quadrants

relationships.name: Factor Links To Gap
relationships.description: SWOT weakness factor links to a formally identified gap

relationships.name: Factor Links To Capability Gap
relationships.description: SWOT weakness factor links to an EA capability gap

relationships.name: Factor Links To Threat Assessment
relationships.description: SWOT threat factor links to a formal GA threat assessment

relationships.name: Factor Links To Opportunity Assessment
relationships.description: SWOT opportunity factor links to a formal GA opportunity assessment

relationships.name: Factor References Trend
relationships.description: SWOT external factor (O/T) references an existing orgctx trend

relationships.name: Factor References Capability
relationships.description: SWOT internal factor (S/W) references an EA business capability

relationships.name: Synthesizes To TOWS
relationships.description: SWOT analysis is synthesized into a TOWS matrix for strategy generation

relationships.name: Has TOWS Strategy
relationships.description: TOWS synthesis contains strategy options across four quadrants

relationships.name: TOWS Produces Strategy
relationships.description: TOWS strategy option, if adopted, produces a VSOM strategy component

relationships.name: Analyzed By Ansoff
relationships.description: Organization context is analyzed by an Ansoff growth matrix

relationships.name: Has Ansoff Quadrant
relationships.description: Ansoff matrix contains four growth quadrants

relationships.name: Ansoff Informs Strategy
relationships.description: Ansoff growth direction choice informs VSOM strategy formulation

relationships.name: Ansoff Informed By SWOT
relationships.description: Ansoff growth direction is informed by SWOT assessment

relationships.name: Has Competitive Positioning
relationships.description: Organization context has a competitive positioning assessment

relationships.name: Positioning Informs Strategy
relationships.description: Competitive positioning informs VSOM strategy

relationships.name: Positioning Leverages Differentiator
relationships.description: Competitive positioning leverages value proposition differentiators

businessRules.name: Porter's Must Have Five Assessments
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have exactly five ForceAssessment instances covering all five force types

businessRules.name: Porter's Must Reference Landscape
businessRules.action: THEN competitiveLandscapeRef MUST reference a valid orgctx:CompetitiveLandscape @id

businessRules.name: Force Assessment Must Reference Existing Force
businessRules.action: THEN competitiveForceRef MUST reference a valid orgctx:CompetitiveForce @id

businessRules.name: Force Weights Must Sum to 1.0
businessRules.action: THEN the sum of all five force weights MUST equal 1.0

businessRules.name: SWOT Must Have All Quadrants
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have at least one SWOTFactor in each quadrant (Strength, Weakness, Opportunity, Threat)

businessRules.name: SWOT Weakness Should Link Gap
businessRules.condition: IF a SWOTFactor has quadrant 'Weakness' and significance 'Critical' or 'High'
businessRules.action: THEN gapRef SHOULD reference a ga:IdentifiedGap or ea:CapabilityGap @id

businessRules.name: SWOT External Factor Should Link Trend
businessRules.condition: IF a SWOTFactor has quadrant 'Opportunity' or 'Threat'
businessRules.action: THEN trendRef or competitiveForceRef SHOULD reference an orgctx entity for evidence

businessRules.name: TOWS Strategy Must Cross Quadrants
businessRules.action: THEN internalFactorRefs MUST reference S or W factors matching the TOWS quadrant, AND externalFactorRefs MUST reference O or T factors matching the TOWS quadrant

businessRules.name: TOWS Quadrant Factor Consistency
businessRules.action: THEN internalFactorRefs MUST reference Strength factors AND externalFactorRefs MUST reference Opportunity factors. Similarly for WO, ST, WT.

businessRules.name: Ansoff Must Have Four Quadrants
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST have exactly four AnsoffQuadrant instances

businessRules.name: Ansoff Penetration Must Reference Existing
businessRules.action: THEN existingProductRefs and existingMarketRefs SHOULD reference existing orgctx:Product and orgctx:MarketContext @ids

businessRules.name: Ansoff Diversification Must Specify Type
businessRules.action: THEN diversificationType MUST be specified (Related, Unrelated, or Conglomerate)

businessRules.name: Competitive Positioning Must Have Generic Strategy
businessRules.action: THEN genericStrategy MUST be one of Porter's four generic strategies

businessRules.name: Adopted TOWS Strategy Must Reference VSOM
businessRules.action: THEN vsomStrategyRef MUST reference a valid vsom:StrategyComponent @id

businessRules.name: Significant Porter Force Change Triggers Review
businessRules.condition: IF a ForceAssessment shows intensityLevel changed by 2+ levels from previous assessment
businessRules.action: THEN a vsom:StrategicReviewCycle with triggerType 'MarketEvent' SHOULD be triggered

changeControl.changeNotes: Initial release of INDUSTRY-ONT as part of VE-Series VSOM-SA (Strategy Analysis). Provides Porter's Five Forces Analysis, SWOT/TOWS strategy synthesis, Ansoff Growth Matrix, and Competitive Positioning frameworks. References existing ORG-CONTEXT-ONT entities (CompetitiveLandscape, CompetitiveForce, Competitor, Trend) — adds analytical framework layer without duplication. Cross-references VSOM-ONT v3.0.0, BSC-ONT v1.0.0, GA-ONT v1.0.0, EA-CORE-ONT v1.0.0, VP-ONT v1.2.3, PPM-ONT v4.0.0.
